title: Register Wan 2.2 5B (TI2V) model + write model-onboarding playbook
description: Wire the Wan 2.2 TI2V-5B model into the app end-to-end AND write the missing 'add a new model' playbook doc (recon found the knowledge scattered across 7 places, no single procedure). 5B = combined t2v+i2v single-transformer (LTX-shape: flat dependencies[], NOT Wan-22's commonDeps+operations{}). type:'wan5b' (ratios.js already routes wan5b -> WAN_5B_RATIOS from MPI-171). id:'wan22-5b', name:'Wan 2.2 5B', tier low, single-stage (multiStage:false), Finish-only (no branchingContinue), audio:false. Ships the quanhaol 4-step turbo LoRA (model-only, str 0.8, SA_Solver/simple/4-step/CFG-1). Workflow: comfy_workflows/wan22_5b_ti2v.json (t2v/i2v gated via MpiSimpleBoolean Input_Text_to_video + MpiIfElse, like LTX). 3 NEW deps to R2 (cubric-models bucket, vision/wan-2.2-5b/): model 9.31GB, wan2.2_vae 1.31GB, turbo-lora 317MB. Reused deps (already hosted): umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled (shared w/ 14B), ComfyUI-MpiNodes, comfyui-kjnodes, ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite. GOTCHA: lora path on disk has space+backslash 'loras/wan 2.2/' -> normalize. VRAM auto-computes from footprint.js (8GB floor via MIN_FLOOR; near-zero RAM since 5B fp16 ~10GB fits). NO version bump (models aren't versioned). Files: dependencies.js (+3), models.js (+1 entry), workflow placement, docs/add-model-playbook.md (NEW), CLAUDE.md router pointer.
